title: 10 best herbal tinctures for angina
description: Ginseng tinctures helps with angina because it has been shown to improve blood flow to the heart, reducing symptoms of chest pain and discomfort. The herb's vasodilatory properties help to relax constricted coronary arteries, increasing oxygen delivery to the heart muscle. Additionally, ginseng tincture's anti-inflammatory effects may help reduce inflammation in the cardiovascular system, which can contribute to angina.
